key_points.text: NVIDIA secured a multi-year agreement to supply next-generation Blackwell GPUs to a top-three cloud provider, with revenue expected to materially increase starting next quarter

citation.quote: NVIDIA has signed a multi-year agreement to supply next-generation Blackwell GPUs to a top-three cloud provider, a deal expected to add materially to data-center revenue beginning next quarter

key_points.text: The Blackwell supply deal reinforces NVIDIA's data-center backlog and pricing power according to analyst commentary

citation.quote: Analysts called the agreement a strong incremental demand signal that reinforces NVIDIA's data-center backlog and pricing power
